components.buttons: solid primary for main CTAs, outline text-primary for secondary. rounded-md.
components.cards: bg-white border border-gray-200 shadow-sm rounded-lg. No heavy drop shadows.
components.tables: shadcn table with hover effects. header text muted and uppercase.
components.badges: rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold. Status specific coloring.
components.chatbot: Floating action button in bottom right. Card-based modal interface.

hero_background.description: Abstract maroon and gold academic background

ocr_illustration.description: AI Document scanning illustration for TOR upload page

university_students.description: Students walking on campus, useful for landing page sections

pages.name: Landing Page
pages.description: Hero section with background image, university branding, and clear CTAs for Login / Guest Access.

pages.name: Applicant Dashboard
pages.description: Bento grid layout for application status, document upload (TOR), and subject matching overview.

pages.name: Evaluator Panel
pages.description: Side-by-side view: left side shows uploaded TOR document preview, right side shows AI match panel with color-coded scores.

pages.name: Admin Dashboard
pages.description: Data-heavy tables for managing curricula, applications, users, and reports.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over primary maroon background meets APCA contrast standards. Use white text.
accessibility.interactive: Include hover and focus states for all clickable elements. Focus rings should use accent gold.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use pure HTML + Tailwind for marketing/landing page layouts. Avoid over-using Shadcn layout components like Cards for creative sections.
For the Applicant and Evaluator dashboards, use Shadcn tables, select, tabs, and modals.
Implement the side-by-side evaluator panel utilizing CSS Grid (grid-cols-2).
Integrate the provided Acredia logo in the top left navigation bar.
Ensure all buttons have specific data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='upload-tor-button').
Use Playfair Display for all main headers (h1, h2, h3) and Inter for all body text.
Color code the Match results: Green for >= 85, Yellow for 60-84, Red for < 60.
Use Phosphor icons or lucide-react for iconography. Install necessary packages if needed.
